mlkit_advanced_unsupported: Na'urar na yanzu baya goyan bayan ML Kit Advanced
permission_reason: Don tabbatar da cewa taga subtitle da tantance magana suna aiki da kyau, da fatan za a ba da izini masu zuwa:
permission_accessibility: Sabis na isa ga taken taken
engine_whisper_desc: Yi amfani da whisper.cpp; bayan gano ƙarshen jimla, za a rubuta dukkan jimlar, tare da jinkirin kusan 3-5 seconds.
engine_mlkit_basic_desc: Amfani da ML Kit Basic, akwai akan yawancin na'urorin Android 12+.
engine_mlkit_advanced_desc: Don amfani da ML Kit Advanced, ana buƙatar na'urar da ke goyan bayan AICore/Gemini Nano.
cancel_download_message: Shin kun tabbata kuna son soke zazzagewar {model}? Ci gaban zazzagewar na yanzu zai ɓace.
delete_model_message: Shin kun tabbata kuna son share {model}? Wannan aikin zai cire fayil ɗin samfurin da aka sauke, kuma kuna buƙatar sake zazzage shi kafin ku iya amfani da shi.
model_not_downloaded: Ba a sauke samfurin ba tukuna
translation_desc: Ana amfani da harshen tushen zuwa ML Kit da kuma zuwa Wasiwasi lokacin da aka kunna fassarar.
translation_enabled_desc: Nuna tushe da fassarar fassarar fassarar
status_service_failed: Sabis na rubutu kai tsaye ya kasa.
caption_failed: Ba a yi nasarar sarrafa juzu'i ba.
error_no_overlay: Har yanzu ba a yarda da soke wasu aikace-aikacen ba.
error_no_record: Ba a ba da izinin yin rikodi ba.
error_no_notification: Ba a yarda da izinin sanarwa ba.
error_checksum_failed: Tabbatar da samfur ya gaza: SHA-1 na {model} bai dace da ma'ajin tarihi na hukuma ba.
error_accessibility_service_unavailable: Ba a haɗa Sabis ɗin Samun damar Magana ba. Jira dan lokaci kuma a sake gwadawa.
error_model_download_requires_network: Ba a sauke samfurin magana ba. Haɗa zuwa intanit kuma a sake gwadawa.
error_sha1_mismatch: SHA-1 rashin daidaituwa, ana tsammanin {asaman}, ainihin {ainihin}
mlkit_unsupported: {injin} baya goyan bayan wannan na'ura ko yare.
status_running: Ana ci gaba da fassarar lokaci na ainihi
